methodology.source: Numbeo city pages, latest available snapshots in Feb-Mar 2026
notes: rent values come from Numbeo 1-bedroom apartment prices
final lean/moderate/luxury totals are modeled ranges, not copied directly from Numbeo
cities without a direct refreshed basis in the 2026-03-23 working set were recalibrated from the prior model and back-solved into this format; confidence is medium for those inferred records

cities.top_visa: Destination Thailand Visa for long stays plus strong nomad infrastructure.
cities.vibe: Tropical calm, mountain air, cafes, and a huge remote-work scene.

assumptions.lean: Simple 1BR outside center, mostly local food, moderate convenience spending
assumptions.moderate: Decent 1BR, cafes and some eating out, comfortable routine
assumptions.luxury: Nice central 1BR, frequent dining out, comfort-first

cities.top_visa: Vietnam e-visa for short stays with common regional visa-run flexibility.
cities.vibe: Beach mornings, modern apartments, and easy urban living.

assumptions.lean: Outside-center apartment, mostly local meals, low imported-goods spend
assumptions.moderate: Good 1BR, regular cafes, some dates and Grab use
assumptions.luxury: Central newer apartment, frequent dining out, high convenience

cities.top_visa: Vietnam e-visa with nearby Da Nang for airport access.

assumptions.lean: Modeled outside-center 1BR baseline for Hoi An with practical day-to-day spending.

assumptions.luxury: Modeled central 1BR baseline for Hoi An with comfort-first convenience and dining spend.
